description: Sets number of simul weather layers, affects quality of simul weather clouds.
name: setSimulWeatherLayers
problem_notes: Prior to Arma 3 v2.20 the effect of this command seems to be persistent across the game instance, e.g. restarting a mission will not reset it.

Item.desc: cloud layers. -1 to reset to defaults (since 2.20), 0 to disable simul weather.
Item.name: layers
